title: Super Tools
description: Adds tools that can mine larger areas such as 3x3x3.
body:
## Summary
This mod adds tools that can mine larger areas, such as 3x3x3.

## Usage
Craft either a Super Pickaxe, a Super Axe, or a Super Shovel. Then, right-click on a block to mine the 3x3x3 area around it. You can also hold down the left mouse button to normally mine a block.
